description: AKS SKU tier now defaults to Free instead of Standard. The `AksSkuTier` enum has been made internal; use the `WithFreeAksSkuTier()` and `WithStandardAksSkuTier()` extension methods to configure the tier. The EFMigrationResource `ContextTypeName` property has been renamed to `DbContextTypeName`. The JavaScript/TypeScript experimental diagnostic ID has been renamed from `ASPIREEXTENSION001` to `ASPIREJAVASCRIPT001`.
name: API review breaking changes (AKS, EF Core, JavaScript)
